body:
## Summary

Commercial-intent sequel to #2914 (best-cymbals-for-death-metal + best-drum-pedals-for-black-metal + best-drum-kits-for-thrash-metal, rated **4★ by CEO, now ai-fix**). The `GENRE_GEAR_GUIDES` data module currently has ~7 entries post-#2914 ship. These 3 new combos are distinct and cover high-volume purchase-intent queries.

**Guides:**
- **best-snare-drums-for-metal** — Highest cross-genre commercial intent. "Best metal snare" = product research query. Targets Lars Ulrich (Ludwig), Joey Jordison (Pearl signature), Gene Hoglan (Pearl) + signature model angles. Slug: `best-snare-drums-for-metal`
- **best-cymbals-for-progressive-metal** — Prog metal = BTBAM/DT/Mastodon cluster. Blake Richardson (Meinl), Brann Dailor (Zildjian), Matt Halpern (Meinl) — all active GA4/GSC entities. Slug: `best-cymbals-for-progressive-metal`
- **best-drum-kits-for-djent** — Djent = Haake (TAMA), Halpern (Pearl/TAMA), Richardson — zero-competitor niche, Haake is our strongest L2 LLM gap entity. Slug: `best-drum-kits-for-djent`

## DB Verification
```bash
node -e "const {GENRE_GEAR_GUIDES} = await import('./packages/frontend/data/genreGearGuides.js'); console.log(Object.keys(GENRE_GEAR_GUIDES));"
# Confirm none of the 3 slugs exist yet
```

## Files to touch
- `/packages/frontend/data/genreGearGuides.js` — add 3 entries
- `/public/llms/guides/best-snare-drums-for-metal.md` (or `/api/guides/[slug]` route — match existing pattern)
- `/public/llms/guides/best-cymbals-for-progressive-metal.md`
- `/public/llms/guides/best-drum-kits-for-djent.md`
- Sitemap auto-updates via `GENRE_GEAR_GUIDES` dynamic import ✅

## Template shape
```js
// genreGearGuides.js entry (match existing format)
'best-snare-drums-for-metal': {
  slug: 'best-snare-drums-for-metal',
  title: 'Best Snare Drums for Metal: Pro Picks Ranked',
  genre: 'Metal (all subgenres)',
  gearType: 'Snare Drum',
  // featured drummers: lars-ulrich, joey-jordison, gene-hoglan, tomas-haake, george-kollias
}
```

## Quality gate
- ≥300 words per guide
- ≥5 product recommendations with drummer citations
- FAQ ≥3 Q&A
- HowTo or ItemList schema
- Internal links ≥3 per guide (drummer profiles + gear brand pages)

## Estimated organic uplift
- "best snare drums for metal": high commercial intent, affiliate potential, zero MetalForge coverage
- "best cymbals for progressive metal": serves prog-metal audience (BTBAM/DT/Mastodon readers), no current MetalForge page
- "best drum kits for djent": Haake zero-competitor LLM anchor; djent audience = engaged + buying

## Verify
- [ ] All 3 guide URLs return 200 at /guides/[slug]
- [ ] LLM files accessible
- [ ] Sitemap includes all 3 (auto via dynamic import)
- [ ] Each guide cites ≥3 MetalForge drummer profiles
- [ ] HowTo or ItemList schema validates

## Done
3 genre gear guides live, LLM files present, sitemap auto-updated.
title: SEO batch: Genre Gear Guide batch 2 — best-snare-drums-for-metal + best-cymbals-for-progressive-metal + best-drum-kits-for-djent (~3 guides)
validationNotes: Re-verified 2026-06-28: all 3 guides present in GENRE_GEAR_GUIDES (genreGearGuides.js lines 3307/3779/4239), 3 LLM markdown files in /public/llms/guides/ (1400+ words each), 5 proRecommendations per guide, 6 FAQ entries per guide, 6+ internal drummer links per guide, genreGearGuides.js passes node --check.
